section_id: Section on Registration of Foreign Principals, Employers and Projects
title: Registration of Foreign Principals, Employers and Projects
content: Registration shall refer to the act of recognizing and entering in the official records of the POEA the existence of a foreign principal/employer or project whose documents have been verified in the jobsite by the appropriate officials of the Philippine government.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
